title: First Flight
brief: Welcome. This is a guided demo — just press Play and watch. You are the Mission Autonomy (MA) brain: you read Flight Autonomy's live stream and send it messages. Here the mission solves itself so you can see the whole loop end to end.
teaches: The realtime MA→FA loop at a glance: wait for the capability to advertise AVAILABLE, ACQUIRE secondary control, command a heading and altitude, then read position reports to know you've arrived and hold. Every panel on the console plays a part — telemetry to read FA, the map to watch the vehicle, and the log to see each message.

objective._doc: Same mission as 1.2 (reused verbatim): fly heading 270 to the zone and hold at 3000 m. Used as a watch-only tutorial demo; the reference brain drives it.
